description:
Parent epic: V3 E7: Errors, debugging, and inspection

Source task 2/8 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Verify `inspect_agent`, `inspect_request`, `inspect_trace`,
  `inspect_compaction`, and AgentView snapshots.

Epic closure criteria:
- users can answer what happened in a turn without reading logs
- errors are normalized, readable, and safe to display
- debugging output is structured, bounded, and safe by default

comments.text: Verified the public inspection surfaces together on a running agent, including inspect_agent, inspect_request(pid, request_id), inspect_trace, inspect_compaction, and Agent.View snapshot projection. Fixed the two-arity inspect_request path for running agent refs.

title: E7: Verify inspectagent, inspectrequest, inspecttrace, inspectcompaction, and Agent...
